top_signals.title: Bank of England to push ahead with plan to limit hedge fund leverage
top_signals.summary: Move to make gilt market more resilient has been criticised for potentially raising funding costs
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Bending Spoons takes private equity public
top_signals.summary: The Italian tech group behind AOL is a good analogue for PE-backed software and tech roll-ups
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Argentina angered by prospect of oil boom in Falklands
top_signals.summary: Islands’ first commercial production in 2028 would transform tiny fishing-dependent economy
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: The stablecoin bandwagon is getting crowded
top_signals.summary: For all their momentum, stablecoins’ moderate benefits come with a host of drawbacks
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Digital finance could spur Eurozone integration
top_signals.summary: Stablecoins could provide a common safe asset for the bloc and boost demand for the euro and bonds
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Man arrested after his ex-wife and daughter found dead in Nagano
top_signals.summary: The same man was arrested on suspicion of trying to kill his 14-year-old son with a knife earlier the same day.
